title: Defining a model
text: A model is a class that inherits from pydantic.BaseModel. Fields are declared as class attributes with type annotations. Instantiating the class validates and coerces the input data.
code:
from pydantic import BaseModel

class User(BaseModel):
    name: str
    age: int

title: Field defaults and metadata
text: Use Field() to attach a default value and metadata such as a description to a model field.

title: Serialize a model to a dictionary (v2)
text: In Pydantic v2, convert a model instance to a dictionary with model_dump(). The older .dict() method still exists but is deprecated in v2.

title: Serialize a model to a dictionary (v1)
text: In Pydantic v1, convert a model instance to a dictionary with the .dict() method.

title: Serialize a model to JSON (v2)
text: In Pydantic v2, produce a JSON string with model_dump_json(). The v1 .json() method is deprecated in v2.

title: Serialize a model to JSON (v1)
text: In Pydantic v1, produce a JSON string with the .json() method.

title: Validate and parse input (v2)
text: In Pydantic v2, build and validate a model from a dict with model_validate(), and from a JSON string with model_validate_json(). These replace v1's parse_obj and parse_raw.

title: Parse input into a model (v1)
text: In Pydantic v1, build and validate a model from a dict with parse_obj(), and from a JSON string with parse_raw().

title: Custom field validators (v2)
text: In Pydantic v2, attach a custom validator to a field with the @field_validator decorator, usually combined with @classmethod. This replaces v1's @validator.

title: Custom field validators (v1)
text: In Pydantic v1, attach a custom validator to a field with the @validator decorator.

title: Model configuration and immutability (v2)
text: In Pydantic v2, configure a model by assigning model_config = ConfigDict(...). ConfigDict(frozen=True) makes instances immutable. This replaces the v1 inner class Config.
code:
from pydantic import BaseModel, ConfigDict

class Point(BaseModel):
    model_config = ConfigDict(frozen=True)
    x: int

title: Model configuration and immutability (v1)
text: In Pydantic v1, configure a model with an inner class named Config. Setting allow_mutation = False makes instances immutable.

title: Optional fields require a default (v2)
text: In Pydantic v2, an Optional[...] field is still REQUIRED unless you give it a default. Write nickname: Optional[str] = None to make it optional. This behavior changed from v1.

title: Optional fields default to None (v1)
text: In Pydantic v1, an Optional[...] field is automatically optional and defaults to None even without an explicit default value.

title: Generate a JSON schema (v2)
text: In Pydantic v2, generate a JSON schema for a model with model_json_schema(). This replaces v1's .schema().

title: Generate a JSON schema (v1)
text: In Pydantic v1, generate a JSON schema for a model with the .schema() method.

title: Settings management (v2)
text: In Pydantic v2, BaseSettings moved out of the core package. Install pydantic-settings and import BaseSettings from pydantic_settings.

title: Settings management (v1)
text: In Pydantic v1, BaseSettings is part of the core package: import it directly from pydantic.
